text: I am worthy of love, care, and compassion - especially from myself.
My feelings are valid, and it's okay to express them.
I am doing the best I can with what I have right now.
It's okay to ask for help.  I don't have to do this alone.
I am more than my thoughts and feelings.  They will pass.
Today, I choose to be kind to myself.
I have survived 100% of my difficult days so far.  I am resilient.
My mental health matters, and I am taking steps to protect it.
I release what I cannot control and focus on what I can.
I am allowed to take up space.  I am allowed to have needs.
